name: Chelia Blendy
alt_names: シェリア・ブレンディ
description:
__Race:__ Human   
__Affiliation:__ Lamia Scale  
__Guild Mark Location:__ Right Calf  
__Team:__ Team Lamia Scale  
__Magic:__ Sky God Slayer  
__Manga Debut:__ Chapter 267  

Chelia Blendy is a member of Lamia Scale, and the cousin of Sherry Blendy. Chelia is the typical "Dojikko", a very clumsy and cute girl that falls over a lot. She also seems determined to please the Guild Master of Lamia Scale. She doesn't seem to stand up for herself well either, as she apologizes to Lyon for falling, and gets scared when Toby yells at her. She also seems to care about Lyon as she gets angry that he is in love with Juvia.
